since_last: 72% of 89 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +4.25%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 72% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.85% · BTC +0.10% · Gold -0.94% · Nasdaq100 +1.71%. 72% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +4.25%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +4.25%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -1.72%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: HON is the standout at -49.33%
cards.body: Leaders: AMAT +12.01%, KLAC +9.70%, LRCX +9.09%, PANW +7.94%, TER +6.79%. Laggards: HON -49.33%, SOUN -2.26%, AI -2.08%, DLR -1.90%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.58% at $157.18
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.58% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
